text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 165 

GAP_MONPP_COPAY_OS 

LABEL: Gap Mail Order Non-Preferred Pharmacy Copay for other days’ supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary co-payment amount for a day’s supply of the drugs (other than 
1 or 3 months) this tier, using a mail order non-preferred pharmacy (MONPP) during the coverage gap 
phase of the Part D benefit. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME:
